title: Kick off I&A Cycle 1.1R
description:
## Objective
Boundary task. Unblocks the I&A cycle iteration (1.1R, id bzh). Closing this task transitions execution from iteration 1.1 to 1.1R.

## Implementation
Nothing to do beyond closing this task. tk next will pick up 1.1R automatically.
acceptance_criteria: Task closed; iteration 1.1R is the next ready epic
